name: Robin iBeam 250

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: CCAB3DB1-6FD4-4221-897B-D8EA77436105

comment:
It's time to move outside with the iBeam 250™! Whatever the weather, it's always ready to get your party started.
A member of the Robe iSeries, this IP65 rated luminaire gives you those compact WashBeam loved attributes of speed, colour and zoom range while capable of handling all the challenges of being outdoors.

capabilities.comment: RoboSpot disabled except handle faders and PT
Filter 281 (Three Quarter CT Blue) (Half Minus Green)
Filter 285 (Three Quarter CT Orange) (Three Quarter CT Blue)
Rainbow effect (with fade time) from slow - > fast
Rainbow effect (without fade time) from slow - > fast
Multiply mode (multiply Virtual and Colour Mix)
Crossfade (crossfade between Virtual and Colour mix)
